offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, unexpected equipment failures cause tenant complaints. We provide predictive maintenance monitoring instead of reactive maintenance scheduling.
problem: unexpected equipment failures leading to tenant complaints
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try manual logging of maintenance requests and basic alert system for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
